warnings: A family carriage appears at 6.5 of 6 passengers; preserve it as an explicit campaign exception until the rule decision is confirmed.
Carro taberna exists in the spreadsheet but not in the shared rules catalog; treat it as a custom Carro vacío instance for this campaign snapshot.
The sheet does not expose all caravan base stats or feat assignments, so those values remain provisional and must be resolved manually before live play.
Some driver assignments must be recreated or imported, so the snapshot keeps passenger roles and cart occupancy without fabricating missing daily drivers.
Some vehicles have accumulated damage, so the importer preserves current hit points instead of only reconstructing damage.

travellers.name: Asmund (el quesero)
travellers.description: Conrato de exportación de queso hasta Tian Xia (1000 po a la llegada)
